title: Pile Driver Operators
description: Operate pile drivers mounted on skids, barges, crawler treads, or locomotive cranes to drive pilings for retaining walls, bulkheads, and foundations of structures such as buildings, bridges, and piers.

tasks.text: Move hand and foot levers of hoisting equipment to position piling leads, hoist piling into leads, and position hammers over pilings.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Move levers and turn valves to activate power hammers, or to raise and lower drophammers that drive piles to required depths.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Drive pilings to provide support for buildings or other structures, using heavy equipment with a pile driver head.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Conduct pre-operational checks on equipment to ensure proper functioning.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
